skip_reason: The bookmarklet only works when a specific photo/video/360 lightbox is open and the page URL contains a '!6s(https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...)' segment. This requires interactive navigation (clicking into the photo viewer) which isn't reproduced by simply loading target_url, and the bookmarklet opens the extracted image in a new tab rather than showing an in-page modal - neither behavior is reliably testable headless in CI.
notes: Active - extracts a googleusercontent.com photo URL from the current location.href (matching '!6s(https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...)'), upgrades it to full resolution ('=s0-k-no'), and opens it in a new tab. Without a lightbox open, location.href won't contain the !6s segment and the bookmarklet just shows an alert('No image URL found in current URL'). target_url is a best-guess public Maps place page.
